allow: PowerShell(& "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe" -format json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object displayName, installationVersion, installationPath)

PowerShell($vswhere = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe"; if \(Test-Path $vswhere\) { & $vswhere -all -format json } else { "vswhere not found at $vswhere" })

PowerShell($cmakePath = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -Recurse -Filter "cmake.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \($cmakePath\) { & $cmakePath --version } else { "Not found in VS" })

PowerShell($cmakePath = Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio" -Recurse -Filter "cmake.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; & $cmakePath --help 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Visual Studio")
